Report Summary
This strategy is a SPY 0DTE Iron Condor with 10Δ, 5-wide wings, opens at 09:30. Closes when tested short delta exceeds 0.15. Takes profit at 20% of credit and closes. Positions close by 3:30 PM. Entries are daily over 2026-01-01 → 2026-06-12. Over the test period, the strategy executed 111 trades with a 54% win rate. Total P&L came to $606.93 with an average of $5.47 per trade. Risk-adjusted returns were solid at 3.98 Sharpe. Maximum drawdown was 0.0% with a profit factor of 6.60.
Strategy Details
Strategy: TP20 Instrument: SPY Type: Iron Condor Greeks Model: Black-Scholes (default) Target Delta: 10.0 Put Wing Width: 5.0 strikes Call Wing Width: 5.0 strikes Entry Time: 09:30 America/New_York Contracts: 1 Target DTE: 0 (0DTE) Period: 2026-01-01 → 2026-06-12 Frequency: daily Management Rules: • When tested delta > 0.15 → close position • When P&L reaches 20% of max profit → close position • When position is open 6.0 hours → close and exit for the day
